The '''Meris system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] that contained [[Meris I]], [[Meris II]], [[Meris III]], [[Merisee/Legends|Merisee]], [[Meris V]], [[Meris VI]], and the primary star [[Maris]].

{{System-stub}}
